<!-- Code generated by gen-dns-providers; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Configuration for the [Exoscale](https://www.exoscale.com/) DNS provider.

See the [lego documentation](https://go-acme.github.io/lego/dns/exoscale/) for full details.

```yaml
letsEncrypt:
  dnsProvider: "exoscale"
  dnsCredentials:
    # EXOSCALE_API_KEY: API key
    apiKey: ""
    # EXOSCALE_API_SECRET: API secret
    apiSecret: ""
    # EXOSCALE_ENDPOINT: API endpoint URL
    endpoint: ""
    # EXOSCALE_HTTP_TIMEOUT: API request timeout in seconds (Default: 60)
    httpTimeout: ""
    # EXOSCALE_POLLING_INTERVAL: Time between DNS propagation check in seconds (Default: 2)
    pollingInterval: ""
    # EXOSCALE_PROPAGATION_TIMEOUT: Maximum waiting time for DNS propagation in seconds (Default: 60)
    propagationTimeout: ""
    # EXOSCALE_TTL: The TTL of the TXT record used for the DNS challenge in seconds (Default: 120)
    ttl: ""
```

Credentials are passed directly to lego using strong types and are never written to the process environment.
You may also use the raw lego environment-variable names as keys instead of the normalized names.
